title: CobbleDollars Bridge
description: Bridges CobbleDollars to Impactor's Economy Services
body: > ## ⚠️ Impactor Bug Notice ⚠️ > > There is currently a bug in the latest public version of Impactor that results in errors being thrown when Impactor is used as an economy service within other mods while this mod is installed. This issue has been fixed in code through a PR, but it hasnt made its way to an official release. https://github.com/NickImpact/Impactor/pull/30 # CobbleDollars Bridge A Fabric server-sided mod bridging CobbleDollars' balance over to Impactor's Economy Services. This allows you to access and modify a player's CobbleDollars balance through Impactor's commands and for other 3rd party mods that support Impactor. This will entirely replace Impactor's implemented currencies with only the one provided by CobbleDollars. A future update may fix this! **NOTE**: Impactor currently has a bug that will be patched officially in the next release. I have a fixed build available in the SkiesDev Discord, see [here](https://discord.com/channels/1158447623989116980/1321969529252745368/1465763647228743732) More information on configuration can be found on the [Wiki](https://docs.skiesdev.com/cobbledollarsbridge/getting_started/introduction/) ## Installation 1. Download the latest version of the mod from the Releases tab. 2. Download all required dependencies: - [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - [CobbleDollars](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbledollars) - [Impactor](https://modrinth.com/mod/impactor) 3. Install the mod and dependencies into your server's `mods` folder. 4. Configure the mods settings in the `./config/cobbledollarsbridge/` folder. ## Donations This mod was developed as part of the Skies Development goal of **providing free, high quality, and open sourced mods** for the Cobblemon and Fabric communities! If you are able to support this mission, **please consider making a one-time donation or becoming a Member** on [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/stampede2011). Being a member gives you early access to all new mods as well as helping decide on the development direction. During this mods development, the following people supported Skies Development through an active Membership: **Jephon, Vince, GriffinFluff, Fraternidade Gamer, AllieDragon, FrostEffects, SPG, Liopo, Mikirae, YnohtnaUwU, Jaackla, Ryqx, TheWickening, Galaxyminer01, TrainerMarkyMark, SalamanderMan, Skyy, Puff, Trizma, Lotus, TM27, Yalu, Zama, hotdamnitsaaron, Raxant, Zephyr, EasyKillin, Sakaii, Llama, Kryonaut, Ezequiel, skeletan, TPB2, zion, and Drift. Thank you for your generosity**! ❤️ ## Support A community support Discord has been opened up for all Skies Development related projects! Feel free to join and ask questions or leave suggestions :)
